creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Example:

# freebsd-version -rku
12.2-RELEASE-p14
12.2-RELEASE-p7
12.2-RELEASE-p15
# freebsd-version -kru
12.2-RELEASE-p14
12.2-RELEASE-p7
12.2-RELEASE-p15

So how do I know whether the running kernel is p7 or p14 ?

(tested on 12.2, because it's difficult to test if all three versions
are the same)
